advisor.name: Prof. James Whitfield
advisor.title: Consultant Intensivist
advisor.expertise: Critical care and point-of-care lung assessment.

advisor.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
advisor.title: Emergency Medicine Consultant
advisor.expertise: Trauma ultrasound and emergency department POCUS workflows.

advisor.name: Dr. Fatima Al-Zahraa
advisor.title: Consultant Anaesthesiologist
advisor.expertise: Ultrasound-guided nerve blocks and procedural guidance.

advisor.name: Dr. Takeshi Nakamura
advisor.title: Associate Professor
advisor.expertise: Hepatic, renal and gastrointestinal ultrasound protocols.

advisor.name: Dr. Amina Osei
advisor.title: Consultant Obstetrician
advisor.expertise: First-trimester and maternal POCUS in resource-limited settings.

advisor.name: Dr. Lucas Andrade
advisor.title: Emergency Physician
advisor.expertise: FAST and extended FAST in high-volume trauma centres.
